criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance learning experiences.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer documentation, user reviews.

criteria.name: Educational Value
criteria.description: The effectiveness of the app in delivering educational content and achieving learning outcomes.
criteria.sources: Educational expert reviews, user feedback, academic studies.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and engagement facilitated by the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app usage statistics, engagement metrics.

criteria.name: Content Quality
criteria.description: The accuracy, relevance, and comprehensiveness of the educational content provided.
criteria.sources: Educational expert reviews, content audits, user feedback.

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: The app's ability to cater to diverse learners, including those with disabilities.
criteria.sources: Accessibility audits, user reviews, compliance with accessibility standards.
